endpoints.name: List supported endpoints URLs
endpoints.description: Responds with all supported endpoints URLs for v2 version.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Find course mappings
endpoints.description: Returns all course mappings for course offerings.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Find course mappings by externalCourseId
endpoints.description: Responds with course mapping details by externalCourseId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{EXTERNALCOURSEID}} with a real externalcourseid.

endpoints.name: Find course mappings by offeringId
endpoints.description: Responds with course mapping details by offeringId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Add course mapping
endpoints.description: Creates a mapping between the offering and the externalCourseId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid. Replace {{EXTERNALCOURSEID}} with a real externalcourseid.

endpoints.name: Remove course mapping
endpoints.description: Removes the course mapping between the offering and the externalCourseId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid. Replace {{EXTERNALCOURSEID}} with a real externalcourseid.

endpoints.name: Find courses
endpoints.description: Responds with all courses (draft and published.)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Find course by contentId
endpoints.description: Responds with a course matching the contentId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{CONTENTID}} with a real contentid.

endpoints.name: Find activations for a contentId
endpoints.description: Responds with all activations for the contentId provided.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{CONTENTID}} with a real contentid.

endpoints.name: Update course category
endpoints.description: Add or update course category in the metadata of a course.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{CONTENTID}} with a real contentid.

endpoints.name: Update course level
endpoints.description: Add or update the course level in the metadata of a course.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{CONTENTID}} with a real contentid.

endpoints.name: Update course tags
endpoints.description: Add or update course tags in the metadata of a course.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{CONTENTID}} with a real contentid.

endpoints.name: Update course topic
endpoints.description: Add or update the course topic in the metadata of a course.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{CONTENTID}} with a real contentid.

endpoints.name: Find users who have access to the contentId provided
endpoints.description: Responds with users who have access to a specific course by contentId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{CONTENTID}} with a real contentid.

endpoints.name: Update course access
endpoints.description: Provide a user with access to a specific course by rootContentId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{ROOTCONTENTID}} with a real rootcontentid. Replace {{USEREMAIL}} with a real useremail.

endpoints.name: Find current, past and future offerings
endpoints.description: Responds with all offerings for your organisation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create offering
endpoints.description: Creates a new offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Find active offerings
endpoints.description: Responds with active offerings for your organisation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Find scheduled offerings
endpoints.description: Responds with scheduled offerings for your organisation. Scheduled offerings have a start date after today's date (inclusive).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Find offerings where info field matches the specified textPattern
endpoints.description: Find offerings where info field matches the specified text pattern.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{TEXTPATTERN}} with a real textpattern.

endpoints.name: Find past offerings
endpoints.description: Responds with past offerings for your organisation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Offerings summary
endpoints.description: Responds with a summary of all offerings for your organisation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Find offering by ID
endpoints.description: Responds with an offering matching the offeringId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Update offering
endpoints.description: Updates the offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find offering's activities
endpoints.description: Responds with the activities in a specific offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find open response activity attempts
endpoints.description: Responds with all learner activity attempts for open response activities in an offering matching the offeringId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find comments
endpoints.description: Responds with a list of comments made in any posts in a specified channel, within an offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{CHANNELID}} with a real channelid. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find posts
endpoints.description: Responds with a list of posts made in a specified channel, within an offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{CHANNELID}} with a real channelid. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find replies
endpoints.description: Responds with a list of replies to comments in any posts in a specified channel, within an offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{CHANNELID}} with a real channelid. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find learner progress in a specified offering
endpoints.description: Responds with all learner progress in the offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find assessment marks
endpoints.description: Responds with all learner assessment marks in an offering matching the offeringId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find quiz marks
endpoints.description: Responds with all learner quiz marks in an offering matching the offeringId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find all pulse IDs in the specified offering
endpoints.description: Responds with the IDs of all pulses that learners have responded to in a specified offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find pulses by offeringId
endpoints.description: Responds with pulse's responses in an offering matching the offeringId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find pulses by offeringId and pulseId
endpoints.description: Responds with pulse's responses, matching the pulseId, in an offering matching the offeringId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{PULSEID}} with a real pulseid. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find shared social notes in an offering
endpoints.description: Responds with all shared social notes in a specified offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find submissions to assessments, including marks if any
endpoints.description: Responds with all learner assessment submissions and marks, if any, in an offering matching the offeringId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find submissions to a specified open response assessment, including marks if any
endpoints.description: Responds with all learner assessment submissions and marks, if any, in a specified open response assessment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{ASSESSMENTID}} with a real assessmentid. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find a learner's submission to a specified assessment, including marks if any
endpoints.description: Responds with the learner's assessment submission and any marks for the submission.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{ASSESSMENTID}} with a real assessmentid. Replace {{USEREMAIL}} with a real useremail. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find unit reactions
endpoints.description: Responds with user reactions to units in a specified offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find offering's assessments
endpoints.description: Responds with all assessments in an offering matching the offeringId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Update assessment details
endpoints.description: Updates the assessment details for a specified assessment in an offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{ASSESSMENTID}} with a real assessmentid. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Remove assessment document
endpoints.description: Removes the assessment document file for a specified assessment in an offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{ASSESSMENTID}} with a real assessmentid. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid. Replace {{DOCUMENTID}} with a real documentid.

endpoints.name: Update the due dates for a learner's quiz attempt
endpoints.description: Updates the due dates for a learner's quiz attempt specified by the assessmentId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{ASSESSMENTID}} with a real assessmentid. Replace {{USEREMAIL}} with a real useremail. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find offering badges
endpoints.description: Responds with the badge for an offering matching the offeringId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find channels
endpoints.description: Responds with a list of channels in an offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Add channel
endpoints.description: Adds new channel to the specified offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Update channel
endpoints.description: Updates a channel in an offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{CHANNELID}} with a real channelid. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find learners in a group channel
endpoints.description: Finds all learners in a specified group channel.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{CHANNELID}} with a real channelid. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Add learners to a group channel
endpoints.description: Adds a learner to a specified group channel.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{CHANNELID}} with a real channelid. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Remove learners from a group channel
endpoints.description: Removes a learner from the specified group channel.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{CHANNELID}} with a real channelid. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find assessment groups
endpoints.description: Responds with a list of assessment groups in an offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Add an assessment group
endpoints.description: Creates a new assessment group in an offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find learners in an assessment group
endpoints.description: Responds with a list of learners in a specified assessment group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{GROUPID}} with a real groupid. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Add a learner to an assessment group
endpoints.description: Adds a learner into the specified assessment group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{GROUPID}} with a real groupid. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Remove a learner from an assessment group
endpoints.description: Removes a learner from the specified assessment group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{GROUPID}} with a real groupid. Replace {{USEREMAIL}} with a real useremail. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find learners with assessments pending x days before due date within the specified offeringId
endpoints.description: Responds with learners who have one or more assessments due x days before the due date, with each assessment that is due, where x = the number of days specified in the request. The default is 3 days.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Update offering category metadata
endpoints.description: Updates the offering category metadata.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Update offering level metadata
endpoints.description: Updates the offering level metadata.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Update offering tags metadata
endpoints.description: Updates the offering tags metadata.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Update offering topic metadata
endpoints.description: Updates the offering topic metadata.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find offering's users
endpoints.description: Responds with a list of users in the offering (facilitators, learners and markers.).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Adds user to the offering
endpoints.description: Adds one or more users to the offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find Learners marked by a coach
endpoints.description: Responds with all learners marked by the specified coach.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{MARKEREMAIL}} with a real markeremail. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Add learners to be marked by a coach
endpoints.description: Adds an array of learners to be marked by the specified coach.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{MARKEREMAIL}} with a real markeremail. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Remove learners from coach's marking list
endpoints.description: Removes an array of learners from coach's marking list.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{MARKEREMAIL}} with a real markeremail. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Removes user from the offering
endpoints.description: Removes a user from the offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{USEREMAIL}} with a real useremail. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Reset user's assessment to draft state
endpoints.description: Resets the user's submitted assessment to a draft state.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{ASSESSMENTID}} with a real assessmentid. Replace {{USEREMAIL}} with a real useremail. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Award badge
endpoints.description: Awards a badge to a user in the offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{USEREMAIL}} with a real useremail. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Find learner's open response assessment submissions
endpoints.description: Responds with open response assessment submissions by a learner in an offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{USEREMAIL}} with a real useremail. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Gets the current organisation
endpoints.description: Returns the current organisation info.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Add new user
endpoints.description: Creates a new user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Find learner progress in all offerings
endpoints.description: Responds with all learners' progress in all offerings.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Find user by email
endpoints.description: Responds with a user matching the specified email.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{USEREMAIL}} with a real useremail.

endpoints.name: Update user
endpoints.description: Updates the specified user by email.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{USEREMAIL}} with a real useremail.

endpoints.name: Find user's badges
endpoints.description: Responds with all badges that the specified user has been awarded.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{USEREMAIL}} with a real useremail.

endpoints.name: Resend invitation email
endpoints.description: Re-sends an invitation e-mail to the specified user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{USEREMAIL}} with a real useremail.

endpoints.name: Find user's offerings
endpoints.description: Responds with all offerings that the user in.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{USEREMAIL}} with a real useremail.

endpoints.name: Adds the user to the specified offerings as a learner
endpoints.description: Adds a user to an array of offerings by offeringId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{USEREMAIL}} with a real useremail.

endpoints.name: Find learner's progress in a specified offering
endpoints.description: Responds with the learner's progress in a specified offering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{USEREMAIL}} with a real useremail. Replace {{OFFERINGID}} with a real offeringid.

endpoints.name: Add permission to user
endpoints.description: Adds additional permissions to the specified user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{PERMISSIONNAME}} with a real permissionname. Replace {{USEREMAIL}} with a real useremail.

endpoints.name: Find learner's progress in offerings
endpoints.description: Responds with the specified learner's progress in all offerings.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{USEREMAIL}} with a real useremail.

endpoints.name: Suspend user
endpoints.description: Suspends the specified user's account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{USEREMAIL}} with a real useremail.

endpoints.name: Transfer a user between offerings
endpoints.description: Moves the user's access and progress from one offering to another.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IQUALIFY_API_KEY}} with your IQUALIFY API KEY. Replace {{USEREMAIL}} with a real useremail.
